---
title: "DISTRIBUCIONES DE FRECUENCIAS"
subtitle: "TALLER 1"
author: 
  - name: Juan Jose lozano<br>valerie Rincon
    affiliation: "Universidad del Tolima"
    affiliation-url: "https://www.ut.edu.co/"
date: today
lang: es
title-block-banner: "#98b6ed"

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    fontsize: 14pt
    toc: true
    toc-location: right
    number-sections: true
    code-fold: true
    code-summary: "Ver código"
    theme: dark
    highlight-style: monokai
    html-math-method: katex
    smooth-scroll: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
    code-overflow: scroll
    favicon: favicon.ico
    
editor: visual

knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    message: false
    warning: false
    fig.align: center
    fig.width: 6
    fig.height: 6
    out.width: "70%"
---

```{r setup}
options(
  knitr.table.format = "html",
  scipen = 999
)
```

```{=html}
<div style="position:absolute; top:10px; right:10px;">
<img src="Logo_ut(1).png" width="150">
</div>
```

```{=html}
<style>
body{
  background-color:#f7f6ed;
  font-size:130%;
  text-align:justify;
}
</style>
```

#Paquetes

\`\`\`{r} ipak \<- function(pkg){

options(repos = c(CRAN="https://cloud.r-project.org"))

new.pkg \<- pkg\[!(pkg %in% rownames(installed.packages()))\]

if(length(new.pkg)) install.packages(new.pkg, dependencies = TRUE)

invisible(lapply(pkg, function(p) suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(p, character.only = TRUE)) )) }

packages \<- c("tidyverse","kableExtra","psych","readxl")

ipak(packages) \`\`\` quarto publish
